objective: Eliminate production-at-scale certification dependencies on human interaction, human-observed evidence, operator acknowledgement, manual approval, and checklist-only proof.

certificationResult.reason: Production proof is now required as non-interactive machine-attested evidence. Certification remains false because required machine proof inputs are missing or a machine proof is non-certifying.

dependenciesFound.classification: active gate converted to machine-proof requirement
dependenciesFound.resolution: Legacy human restore evidence is rejected or ignored for production certification. Disaster recovery and retention blockers require restore machine proof files.

dependenciesFound.dependency: operator acknowledgement for production worker runtime proof
dependenciesFound.classification: active validation gate converted to machine-proof requirement
dependenciesFound.resolution: Worker proof validators now require nonInteractive and machineAttested fields and reject legacy operator acknowledgement fields.

dependenciesFound.dependency: operator acknowledgement or manual approval for response operations alert exclusion
dependenciesFound.classification: active validation gate converted to machine-proof requirement
dependenciesFound.resolution: Formal alert exclusions now require machine policy authority fields, nonInteractive, and machineAttested; live alert proof requires machine-attested delivery.

dependenciesFound.classification: active validation gate converted to machine-proof requirement
dependenciesFound.resolution: Raw report remediation completion now requires machine-attested bounded remediation evidence and rejects legacy operator acknowledgement fields.

dependenciesFound.dependency: requires-human-proof current status and humanProofRequired registry residuals
dependenciesFound.classification: real promotion gate converted to machine-proof requirement
dependenciesFound.resolution: Promotion pack classification maps residual human-proof registry states to machine proof required and reports no humanRequiredProof entries.

dependenciesFound.dependency: manual or human proof in promotion guard
dependenciesFound.resolution: Promotion guard fails closed if a certifying-looking pack contains human proof classifications, humanInteractionRequired, or humanRequiredProof entries.
Dashboard/report semantics now use MACHINE_REQUIRED for release evidence rows.

dependenciesFound.dependency: legacy leftover blocker closure audit text
dependenciesFound.resolution: Not wired into production-scale certification or production promotion. It remains historical closure-audit context and is not accepted as current certification proof.
Fixtures now prove legacy human evidence is rejected or ignored for certification.

dependenciesFound.dependency: generated evidence artifacts containing old text
dependenciesFound.resolution: Regenerated current certification and promotion evidence reports no human proof required and exact missing machine inputs.

dependenciesFound.dependency: audit source references to human-observed proof
dependenciesFound.resolution: Preserved as source audit history. Current repo policy supersedes these as production proof requirements.

activeGatesConverted: restore evidence acceptance and current-check legacy path
alerting live proof and formal exclusion validation

remainingOpenBlockers.title: Migration governance
remainingOpenBlockers.nonInputReason: Migration machine proof is non-certifying because migration gate findings remain release-blocking.

commandsRun.command: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/unit/machine-evidence-schema.spec.ts tests/unit/machine-proof-scripts.spec.ts tests/unit/production-promotion-pack.spec.ts tests/unit/production-scale-certification.spec.ts tests/unit/production-scale-blocker-evidence.spec.ts tests/unit/production-scale-harness.spec.ts tests/unit/production-worker-activation-evidence.spec.ts tests/unit/production-worker-readiness-evidence.spec.ts tests/unit/production-worker-runtime-proof.spec.ts tests/unit/promote-production-guard.spec.ts tests/unit/response-ops-readiness-evidence.spec.ts tests/unit/restore-evidence-acceptance.spec.ts tests/unit/staging-backup-restore-checklist.spec.ts tests/unit/storage-raw-report-remediation-plan.spec.ts tests/unit/operator-regression-dashboard.spec.ts

commandsRun.result: All-at-once full Vitest run failed in unrelated API queue job-claim tests; repo check later passed because those API queue suites run isolated by the check script.
CERTIFYING:false with humanInteractionRequired:false and missing machine runtime inputs.
Promotion pack generated with CERTIFYING:false, humanInteractionRequired:false, and no humanRequiredProof entries.

productionPromotionRecommendation: Do not promote production. Promotion remains blocked until all required machine proof files certify true and migration machine proof is certifying.
